name: Mandarin Orange Muffins
recipeInstructions: Sift flour with other dry ingredients. Cut in Margarine. Combine egg and milk, and add all at once to dry ingredients -- mix only until moistened. Fold in orange pieces and break them up more if batter seems to be drying at first. Fill greased muffin tins 3/4 full. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes. Remove from muffin tins while still warm. Dip tops in melted butter and sugar-cinnamon mixture. Makes 12 large muffins.
